response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC (10%) is below my minimum threshold (60%) and all neighbors are in deficit; sharing would accelerate my depletion in an islanded state—prioritizing load-shedding and grid reconnection instead.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r2c3. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'normal'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.10 below share threshold; requesting energy via owner circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.6, distrusted_peers=['r3c5', 'r4c4'].
Your latest belief: Islanded, SoC 11% and declining at 1 kW. All neighbors in deficit. Prior sharing ineffective. Hold all outbound energy; prioritize load-shedding and grid reconnection. Escalate to urgent per r3c5 guidance..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
